perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a black beret and a white lace dress stands in front of a Costco refrigerator, holding a box of CP Authentic Asia Shrimp Wonton Tom Yum Soup, smiling and gesturing. (2) The scene transitions to an indoor home setting where the same woman and another woman in a zebra-print bucket hat are sitting at a table with several black plastic soup bowls. (3) Close-up shots show the packaging detail, the frozen bowls inside, and the process of adding water. (4) The women are seen tasting the soup, showing the shrimp inside the wontons, and giving thumbs-up gestures with expressions of enjoyment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-tempo background music starts. A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese. (2) A calm, informative male voiceover joins, explaining the price and the microwave heating instructions. (3) The female voice returns with enthusiastic tones while describing the taste and texture of the wontons. (4) Background music remains consistent until the end of the clip.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top. (2) Hook: '妹妹煮給我吃' (Sister cook for me to eat). (3) Functional: '最新出的這是什麼？ 冷凍鮮蝦雲吞冬蔭功' (What is this new product? Frozen Shrimp Wonton Tom Yum). (4) Functional: '449元' (Price). (5) Effect: '非常泰 非常入味' (Very Thai, very flavorful) in bold red and yellow text. (6) Decorative: '好吃過癮' (Delicious and satisfying) at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at store -> Unboxing/Cooking at home -> Taste test and review

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing on screen.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman in a black beret and white dress; another in a zebra-patterned bucket hat and a brown apron/top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First part shows Costco warehouse shelves and freezers; second part shows a home dining/kitchen area with a table and snacks in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a product review intended to influence viewers to purchase a specific frozen soup product from Costco. It combines an initial 'discovery' hook at the retail location with a practical demonstration of preparation and a positive tasting experience at home to build credibility and desire.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product packaging and enthusiastic verbal recommendation.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy fast-paced Chinese food vlogging style with prominent text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses the 'Costco find' trend to engage viewers interested in quick, high-quality frozen meals.
